## Detection change

- Rule ID:
- Lifecycle state:
- Behavior and expected analyst value:

## Review evidence

- [ ] Required telemetry and fields are available or gaps are documented.
- [ ] Correlation key, sequence and time window are justified.
- [ ] ATT&CK mappings include confidence and rationale.
- [ ] Rule and alert schema validation passes.
- [ ] Malicious, benign, near-miss and time-bound cases are covered where relevant.
- [ ] Unexpected and duplicate alerts fail tests.
- [ ] Tuning is scoped, expiring and regression-tested.
- [ ] Severity, risk rationale and known limitations are current.
- [ ] Manifest, playbook, coverage and review references are consistent.

## Open findings / deployment dependencies

Document anything requiring human or environment-owner review. This checklist is a portfolio self-review control and is not evidence of multi-person production approval.
